assertions.title: Welcome first-time renders core content
assertions.rationale: Hero text, New Keyset card copy, primary CTA, and chip row actions were all visible on /demo/welcome-first-time with no page errors.

steps.expected: First-time welcome content and actions render
steps.observed: Rendered hero 'Split your Nostr key. Sign from anywhere.', New Keyset card, Create New Keyset, Import Device Profile, and Onboard

assertions.title: Welcome first-time Create New Keyset navigates to /create
assertions.rationale: Clicking the primary CTA moved the URL to /create.

assertions.title: Welcome first-time Import Device Profile navigates to /import
assertions.rationale: Clicking the Import Device Profile chip moved the URL to /import.

assertions.title: Welcome first-time Onboard navigates to /onboard
assertions.rationale: Clicking the Onboard chip moved the URL to /onboard.

assertions.title: Welcome first-time secondary actions render as chips
assertions.rationale: Import Device Profile and Onboard rendered as compact pill-like controls in one row with muted blue styling, distinct from the full-width primary button above.

steps.expected: Secondary actions are chip-style controls in one row after 'or'
steps.observed: Both secondary controls were compact (~30px high), muted blue chips on the same row; primary Create button was larger full-width blue button

assertions.title: Returning (single) renders core content
assertions.rationale: Returning-single scenario displayed required title, profile row, subtitle, Unlock/Rotate buttons, and chip-style secondary actions; no page errors.

steps.expected: Welcome back content with one profile row and secondary chip actions
steps.observed: Rendered 'Welcome back.', 'My Signing Key', subtitle '2/3 · #0 · npub1qe3...7k4m', Unlock + Rotate, and chip row with New Keyset/Import Device Profile/Onboard

assertions.title: Returning (single) profile subtitle includes localShareIdx
assertions.rationale: Subtitle included the required middle localShareIdx segment and separators in the order `2/3 · #0 · npub...`.

steps.expected: Subtitle contains `2/3 · #0 · npub...` with #0 between separators

summary: Tested 7 assertions in welcome group A: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
